g.text: has the potential for being trimmed. This line is
provided to prevent trimming of your text/images.
This is the actual cutline of your final design.
Extend any screen artwork/color to the edge
(covering the gray) if you want your design to

text.tspan: extend to the edge on the final print.

g.text: bleed of 1/8”. Please use the Safe Zone guideline
to prevent trimming of essential text/images.
The bleed is to make sure your design/color
extends to the edge of the screen.
This is the minimum recommended border
area. If you want a border around the edge
of your screen, you will want it to extend
the width of this guide on each side of the screen.

text.tspan: Both players roll their remaining meeples.
Players take up to of the following actions:
a) reroll any number of meeples
Players pick up all but meeples.
The winner picks up all of their meeples
The loser places 1 meeple on the Casualty
Track (along with any in the Neutral Zone).
Both players place 1 meeple in the Neutral
